sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82780" key="petroba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρο-βάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n82780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who climbs rocks</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0551.tlg017.perseus-grc1:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope> </bibl>; of Pan, Poet. ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.31a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
